data.name: autoplay_description
data.value: Watch a perfect automated BMS playthrough.

data.name: auto_scratch_description
data.value: Automatically handles scratch notes and removes them from scoring and gauge.

data.name: auto_note_description
data.value: Automatically handles non-scratch notes and removes them from scoring and gauge.

data.name: note_visibility_description
data.value: Controls whether auto-noted notes remain visible on the playfield.

data.name: tint_notes_description
data.value: Tint auto-noted notes to make the assist state obvious during play.

data.name: note_tint_colour_description
data.value: The tint applied to auto-noted notes when tinting is enabled.

data.name: scratch_visibility_description
data.value: Controls whether auto-scratched notes remain visible on the playfield.

data.name: tint_scratch_notes_description
data.value: Tint auto-scratched notes to make the assist state obvious during play.

data.name: scratch_tint_colour_description
data.value: The tint applied to auto-scratched notes when tinting is enabled.

data.name: hell_charge_note_description
data.value: Uses hell charge note long note timing.

data.name: gauge_hard_description
data.value: Uses the hard BMS survival gauge.

data.name: gauge_ex_hard_description
data.value: Uses the EX-HARD BMS survival gauge.

data.name: gauge_hazard_description
data.value: Uses the hazard BMS survival gauge.

data.name: gauge_auto_shift_description
data.value: Downgrades to a lower gauge instead of failing immediately.

data.name: starting_gauge_description
data.value: The highest gauge tier to begin the chart on.

data.name: floor_gauge_description
data.value: The lowest gauge tier GAS may downgrade to.

data.name: judge_iidx_description
data.value: Uses the OMS fixed beatmania IIDX timing preset.

data.name: judge_rank_description
data.value: Overrides the chart's default #RANK timing tier for judge systems that support difficulty-based windows.

data.name: judge_difficulty_description
data.value: Overrides the chart's default #RANK timing tier for the active judge system when that judge family supports difficulty-based windows.

data.name: sudden_description
data.value: Masks the upper portion of the playfield (SUDDEN+ style).

data.name: hidden_description
data.value: Masks the lower portion of the playfield before notes reach the judgement line (HIDDEN+ style).

data.name: top_lane_cover_description
data.value: Covers the top portion of the playfield.

data.name: bottom_lane_cover_description
data.value: Covers the bottom portion of the playfield.

data.name: remember_gameplay_changes_description
data.value: When enabled, gameplay adjustments update this mod's saved configuration instead of applying only for the current play.

data.name: lift_description
data.value: Raises the judgement line by shortening the lane from the bottom (LIFT-style).

data.name: lift_value_description
data.value: 0-1000 maps to 0%-100% of the current lane height.

data.name: mirror_description
data.value: Mirror button lanes while keeping scratch in place.

data.name: random_description
data.value: Randomise button lanes with RANDOM, R-RANDOM, S-RANDOM, or a custom fixed pattern.

data.name: random_type_description
data.value: Choose which beatmania-style randomisation rule to apply.

data.name: custom_pattern_description
data.value: Optional fixed pattern override. Examples: S7654321, 7654321, or 7654321|7654321 for 14K.
